testcase.name: VerifyCheckOutDetailsSubmission

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.cssSelector: #continue' (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)
